title: ochna micrantha
intro: Ochna micrantha, also known as the small-leaf ochna or Mickey mouse plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae. It is widely used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds that provide various health benefits, including antioxidant, cardiovascular, and immunomodulatory effects. Ochna micrantha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use, although its preparation and dosage should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
